event_comments:
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Note: Some participants on Advanced Beginner were accidentally given different maps at this event – we apologize for the mix up! To ensure everyone gets to see valid results for the map they ran on, we have split Advanced Beginner into three separate classes for this one meet – Advanced Beginner 2, 3X, and 3Y.
Result Status Codes
msp: missing punch
dnf: did not finish
nc: not competing
dq: disqualified
ovt: overtime
dns: did not start
<time>* indicates course completion status was not reported and may be valid, msp, or dnf
